The '''Bettel asteroid drift''' was located near the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. It was used as a stopover point for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleets in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

{{Ast-stub}}
